message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add snapshot regression tests with insta

Add comprehensive snapshot testing infrastructure for headless mode:
- EffectiveCaps struct for capability gating (detected ∩ preset)
- headless_dump_json mode outputs structured JSON for snapshot testing
- Per-frame stats with dirty cells and delta time tracking
- Sentinel markers for content verification (top bar text, section name)

New test file tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs with 5 test cases:
- Default configuration snapshot
- Custom size (120x40) snapshot
- Compact layout (60x20) snapshot
- Limited frames (5) snapshot
- Determinism verification with fixed seed

Completes bd-2649.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
